summary.art: April 3, 2026: ART OnO fair is ongoing. Various local art festivals (e.g., South Street Art Festival) are launching. Leeum Seoul is opening an exhibition today.
summary.market: April 3, 2026: Markets are closed for Good Friday. Investors are digesting the March jobs report and rising geopolitical tensions from the Iran conflict, which caused a broad market slide on April 2nd.
